name: James Dendle
background: James Dendle is the Senior Vice President, Corporate Development. He is a geologist with over 10 years of experience in the mining sector, including roles in exploration, resource estimation, and business development. He joined Triple Flag in 2017.

company_affiliations.name: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chief Operating Officer (formerly Senior Vice President, Corporate Development)
